summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GradNext Admin Panel P0 features: Time Slot Picker with 3 dropdowns (Hour, Minutes in 15-min increments, AM/PM) and Chunked File Upload for large files (2GB+). All 10 requested features are working correctly.

minor.issue: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components should have aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Test videos and materials created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel features fully tested. Time slot picker has 3 separate dropdowns (Hour 01-12, Minutes 00/15/30/45, AM/PM). Chunked upload endpoints work: /api/admin/upload/init, /api/admin/upload/chunk, /api/admin/upload/finalize. All sidebar sections load correctly.

admin_login_mock.details: POST /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin returns admin user with is_admin=true

admin_dashboard_sidebar.details: All 10 sidebar sections found: Overview, Users, Mentors, Recorded Videos, Workshops, Case Drills, Materials, Peer Practice, Cohort, Sales & Invoices

peer_practice_edit_availability_modal.details: Edit Availability modal opens with new From/To time dropdowns and weekly day editors

time_slot_picker_3_dropdowns.details: Time picker has 3 separate dropdowns: Hour (01-12), Minutes (00, 15, 30, 45), AM/PM

add_slot_button.details: Add Slot button adds new time slots to individual days with From/To pickers

apply_to_all_days.details: Apply to All button applies template time slot to all 7 days of the week

recorded_videos_chunked_upload.details: Add Video modal shows ChunkedFileUpload component with 'supports large files up to 2GB+' text

materials_chunked_upload.details: Add Material modal shows ChunkedFileUpload component with 'supports large files' text

backend_chunked_upload_init.details: POST /api/admin/upload/init successfully initializes chunked upload session

sales_invoices_section.details: Sales & Invoices section displays Total Revenue, This Month, P&L Summary, Revenue by Plan, Recent Invoices

mocked_apis.payments: Razorpay payments are mocked (no API keys configured)
